entries.name: FluentRollup
entries.description: Core Fluent rollup contract. Sequencers commit batch roots and EIP-4844 blob hashes; an AWS Nitro Enclave preconfirms each batch via a signature whose key is bound to a PCR0 measurement verified by SP1; participants holding CHALLENGER_ROLE can dispute and the prover resolves disputes with SP1 ZK proofs; batches finalize after a block-count delay or immediately once all blocks are proven.

nitroVerifiers.description: Set of AWS Nitro Enclave verifier contracts allowed to preconfirm batches. Tracked via NitroVerifierEnabled / NitroVerifierDisabled events on the Rollup.

entries.name: NitroVerifier
entries.description: Verifies AWS Nitro Enclave attestations onchain. The enclave's signing key is admitted only after an SP1 proof confirms its attestation matches the expected PCR0 measurement, binding preconfirmation authority to audited enclave code.

receivedPermissions.description: grant / revoke all access control roles on the Rollup contract and configure its core parameters.
revert non-finalized (committed or preconfirmed) batches via revertBatches; cannot revert finalized batches.
execute scheduled timelock operations once the min-delay has elapsed.
configure the rollup binding, oracles, gas parameters and gateway whitelist on the L1 bridge core, and grant / revoke its other roles.
pause / unpause the L1 bridge core and clear expired L1->L2 deposits via skipExpiredDeposits (no user-initiated refund path exists; rollbackMessageWithProof reverts with NOT_IMPLEMENTED).

entries.name: SP1VerifierGateway
entries.description: This contract is the router for zk proof verification. It stores the mapping between identifiers and the address of onchain verifier contracts, routing each identifier to the corresponding verifier contract.

activeVerifiers.description: Verifiers that are routed to by their selector and not frozen.

allVerifiers.description: All verifiers that were ever routed to by this gateway.

entries.name: FastWithdrawalList
entries.description: Per-token rate-limit registry for the optimistic (preconfirmed) fast-withdrawal path. Enforces hourly and daily caps using rolling windows keyed by block timestamp; related tokens (e.g. ETH and WETH) can be aliased to a shared bucket to prevent cap evasion.

entries.name: FluentTimeLock
entries.description: OpenZeppelin TimelockController used to delay privileged operations. PROPOSER_ROLE schedules calls; the configured minimum delay must elapse before EXECUTOR_ROLE can execute them; CANCELLER_ROLE can drop scheduled calls.

entries.name: NativeGateway
entries.description: L1 entry point for ETH deposits into Fluent. Forwards ETH to L1FluentBridge for actual escrow custody and emits the corresponding bridge message. UUPS-upgradeable; upgrades are gated by the contract owner.

entries.name: L1FluentBridge
entries.description: Bridge core for Fluent. Routes deposits from L1 gateways into a FIFO queue consumed by the sequencer, and lets anyone process L2->L1 messages with two Merkle proofs against a preconfirmed or finalized batch root. Custodies bridged ETH on L1 (gateways forward ETH here on deposit). UUPS-upgradeable; upgrades and gateway-whitelist / oracle / pause changes are gated by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE.

receivedPermissions.description: cancel scheduled timelock operations before they are executed.
schedule operations on the timelock; the configured min-delay must elapse before they can be executed.
submit SP1 ZK proofs that resolve challenged batches and accelerate finalization via finalizeWithProofs.
affect the liveness and safety of the gateway - can transfer ownership, add and freeze verifier routes.
AWS Nitro Enclave attestation key admitted to preconfirm batches; binds the optimistic fast-withdrawal path.

entries.name: ERC20Gateway
entries.description: L1 entry point for ERC-20 deposits into Fluent. Custodies ERC-20 tokens directly on L1 and emits the corresponding bridge message; on the L2 side the canonical pegged token is minted via the ERC20TokenFactory. UUPS-upgradeable; upgrades are gated by the contract owner.

receivedPermissions.description: commit batches and submit EIP-4844 blob hashes to the Rollup.

entries.name: NitroVerifier
entries.description: Verifies AWS Nitro Enclave attestations onchain. The enclave's signing key is admitted only after an SP1 proof confirms its attestation matches the expected PCR0 measurement, binding preconfirmation authority to audited enclave code.
